releaseNotes:
release: v1.2.5 (versionCode 8)

- Tapmad direct-API harvester replaces Playwright (12s vs 125s)
- AES-CBC stream decryption + on-VPS JWT cache
- ContentGenraName authoritative sport classifier
- News-placeholder channels (Samaa News etc.) filtered out
- Kickoff timezone corrected: BD UTC+6 (was PKT UTC+5)
- Rich live-premium + upcoming endpoints with Cloudflare bypass
- World Cup tab trimmed to working channels + new Robi FIFA
- UpdateChecker: dismissals persist; debug version bumped ahead of manifest
- bd-stream.netlify.app link replaced with hamyra.vercel.app
- Match Highlights count 60->200 to surface newest matches
- Settings dialog version pulled from BuildConfig (was hardcoded 1.0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
